Name: ChrActTurnParam
Description: Determines the parameters used when a character turns.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Speed
Fields.Description: Standard turning speed for normal turning, the speed and time turning rate are applied to this value. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Speed Rate: Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum turning speed that will be used. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Speed Rate: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum turning speed that will be used. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Speed Rate: % at Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: Speed ​​turning rate at minimum speed.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Speed Rate: % at Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Speed ​​turning rate at maximum speed.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Time Rate: Minimum Time
Fields.Description: The minimum time turning rate will be reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Time Rate: Maximum Time
Fields.Description: The maximum time turning rate will be reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Time Rate: % at Minimum Time
Fields.Description: Time turning rate at minimum time.

Fields.Name: Base - Turn Time Rate: % at Maximum Time
Fields.Description: Time turning rate at maximum time.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Speed
Fields.Description: Turning speed in the mode facing the target direction, reference turning speed is not used. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Speed with Low Delta
Fields.Description: Turning speed in the mode facing the target when the angle difference is small, the reference turning speed is not used. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Low Delta Judgment Angle
Fields.Description: If the angle is smaller than this, the low delta angle speed will be used. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Speed Rate: Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum turning speed that will be used. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Speed Rate: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum turning speed that will be used. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Speed Rate: % at Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: Speed ​​turning rate at minimum speed.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Speed Rate: % at Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Speed ​​turning rate at maximum speed.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Time Rate: Minimum Time
Fields.Description: The minimum time turning rate will be reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Time Rate: Maximum Time
Fields.Description: The maximum time turning rate will be reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Time Rate: % at Minimum Time
Fields.Description: Time turning rate at minimum time.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Turn Time Rate: % at Maximum Time
Fields.Description: Time turning rate at maximum time.

Fields.Name: Turn Acceleration
Fields.Description: Acceleration to reach turning speed. If you want to set the turning speed from the beginning, set a large value. In degrees per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Look Target - Look Ahead Time
Fields.Description: How many seconds after the target do you try to look when facing the target (for AI).

Fields.Name: Base - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Minimum Time
Fields.Description: The minimum time angular acceleration rate is reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Base - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Maximum Time
Fields.Description: The maximum time angular acceleration rate is reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Base - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Minimum Acceleration Rate
Fields.Description: Time angular acceleration rate at minimum time

Fields.Name: Base - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Maximum Acceleration Rate
Fields.Description: Time angular acceleration rate at maximum time

Fields.Name: Look Target - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Minimum Time
Fields.Description: The minimum time angular acceleration rate is reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Maximum Time
Fields.Description: The maximum time angular acceleration rate is reached within this time after the parameter is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Look Target - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Minimum Acceleration Rate
Fields.Description: Time angular acceleration rate at minimum time

Fields.Name: Look Target - Time Turn Acceleration Rate: Maximum Acceleration Rate
Fields.Description: Time angular acceleration rate at maximum time

Fields.Name: Angular Acceleration Interpolation Time at Parameter End
Fields.Description: Time to interpolate acceleration when parameters switch and exit. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Reverse Turn Brake Peformance
Fields.Description: Brake when turning in the opposite direction (disabled at -1). In degrees per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Angular Velocity for Left/Right Blend Ratio
Fields.Description: When the angular velocity exceeds this speed, the blend ratio of left and right animation becomes 1. In degrees per second.
